name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [p \in 1..N |-> state[p] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = idle

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = \*]
          /\ turn' = \*  \* turn may change arbitrarily

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail + 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_counts, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSets
    /\ retransmit_counts \in [chunk \in chunks |-> Int]
    /\ channel \in FiniteSets

Init ==
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE))]
    /\ sent_chunks = {}
    /\ retransmit_counts = [chunk \in chunks |-> 0]
    /\ channel = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus sent_chunks
    /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ retransmit_counts' = [retransmit_counts EXCEPT ![chunk] = retransmit_counts[chunk] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, retransmit_counts>>

ReceiveChunk ==
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ channel' = channel \setminus {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_counts>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus sent_chunks
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
